textByHash.0088a64387118afbae8c907d06466ea58b3d96ee: Ah so you are there master. I'm so glad you summoned me. Please take this lamp, and make your wish!
textByHash.102be34a32a4e0cd273b16d7dfd85d559f922220: I am a mighty and powerful genie. Why do you come here? Speak now or I'll have to think of something exceedingly nasty to do to you.
textByHash.135692d8166c3a36304a7aecf4ffcf7902a2a266: Two reasons really. Firstly, I can see in the dark, so light or dark makes little difference to me.
textByHash.1f58f704f574abdabb321cf9a2d6da6ba3acfdb6: How about I give you the statue in exchange for the sole of the mayor of Nardah?
textByHash.23d01de0f33b063e418a9898b1f331b0cc471f26: Why do I get the sense that I'm not being taken seriously here? Please try to remember I am very dangerous and not to be trifled with.
textByHash.267b6c3a689da8edb1ecf5096d177afaede6f67d: I don't know about that. I can't have just anybody traipsing in here. I have a reputation to keep you see.
textByHash.389b6f6a8b266531d268f93b8e8fbcaef8e25f82: Sorry, I'm trying to talk to someone else, but she seems to be ignoring me.
textByHash.40137158cc18e8bbaea5b0f8c013745f0a67ff1c: Great! Another one for my collection.
textByHash.46d19ee2ead417614afd9b2dab8dcc5a2fbaae9d: I hadn't thought of that. I just read that a lot of the most powerful beings are collecting soles these days. I haven't really got many yet though. You provided me with an opportunity to expand my collection.
textByHash.46fe54595db4af98b1dbbdce4aa3b89aa194ee67: [laugh], even a pathetic human should be able to manage to get another human's sole.
textByHash.484d9b955c493470bd0e908ff86b018f46140b5d: Ah excellent here's the statuette then.
textByHash.6130829968ada285997cb7002c1eb4823dbdb745: Why thank you, I put a lot of effort into my terrifyingness.
textByHash.63b23d429721661ce6b0dc6815245617995ce19c: I wouldn't have said so. It seems a perfectly reasonable thing to request to me. I can think of many things a lot worse I could have asked for.
textByHash.660ed92bb7d4e08fd5ce71504bb8c243b63ee7c1: I lose more masters that way.
textByHash.6911a0437ec377392f316ebb87bc9df4ff9e6e1c: Oh that's easy. In my experience soles are very easy to remove with just a knife.
textByHash.6fc3cbcd77937aa92ad83860e198ba37bfb7abfa: Ah well it's your loss. No sole, then no statuette.
textByHash.71a06287b240737047c2774a30eb874e48642e86: Yes, run. Ruuuun in fear of.. The crevice genie of Nardah! [laugh][laugh][laugh]!
textByHash.7e2cabbcee148e07e20183dfb1078a7f76bcb410: Sorry, I'm trying to talk to someone else, but he seems to be ignoring me.
textByHash.8120e0122a05bbbb6398729b249335ea985c5cf2: You shouldn't ignore a Genie master ?
textByHash.8519ca5be616e4243078d6ba8cc195c27235a706: Actually I'll tell you what, you can hang around here for a bit, but be sure to spread the word about what a terrifying experience you had when you ran into... The crevice genie of Nardah!
textByHash.85954f39fa6c08827986b35db8dfb63c08590072: Well no rush, I quite like the statuette too.
textByHash.8ee787131c203bfe1b1b467296507e3d3e8eab8e: It's good doing business with you again.
textByHash.90b1a19062355c0eaaf7522debf8906f178bf420: Not all genies are goody two shoes who go round granting wishes. It's something that my pathetic brother does to make people like him, but that's not my style.
textByHash.92eaad775ab20d1b79e6703b941a082507eed893: Ah, so you are there, Master . I'm so glad you summoned me. Please take this lamp and make your wish.
textByHash.97e5839d369a7f5ebd417633e76d1a69db1f998e: Hey, no casting spells on my house!
textByHash.a27c276c9dc4331ab3ba0f88505b1a228c9b0b31: Ahh yes someone did drop a statue on my head recently. Very nice workmanship, looks quite old and valuable too. I'm surprised someone threw it away!
textByHash.a43a3e6ea837cf320d7236575d1b78170f9ff21a: Wait! Did you say quite scary? I'll have you know I am VERY scary!
textByHash.a89c8e4f66000b3466086a7c875086272f72b3b4: Ah, so you are there, Mistress . I'm so glad you summoned me. Please take this lamp and make your wish.
textByHash.c1f0eaaf83919acb580e1ff4c8f428ae3d359695: Hey get your hands off my house.
textByHash.caa0213703eca660b40827a46a3049862550abb6: Silence cur! They fear and respect me and that's an end to it.
textByHash.e25157f4f833e9cf177ccf6e828d388170e0072e: Ah excellent, here's the statuette then.
textByHash.ef6d42bb472d15e54713f43013e9a4cfd65c83b9: Do you have the sole of Awusah, so that we can make our trade?
textByHash.ef860b1f9d329dc7c4801cbbea539c90b75d3d0f: Sorry, but I'm trying to talk to . However he appears to be ignoring me...
textByHash.f966b3c80af9844e6284f69edcf4965728848f0b: I like to think of myself more as an evil and scary sort of genie, who people talk about in hushed and fearful tones.
textByHash.fbfe085ff48618fc5926d3714df25f7000ee033b: Lastly, I gather it's normal for powerful terrifying creatures to lurk around in dark caves, so I found this one to lurk in myself, nice isn't it?
textByHash.fc86d510dc604788061c253455cdc9439127e2e9: Hmm a deal eh? I think we can come to some sort of arrangement. I'll give you the valuable statuette in return for, let me think ....
textByHash.fd7e9988f13dd92e88aa24be760490e09827cf04: Well fortunately for you, I am a mighty and powerful genie and managed to reacquire it. I will give it to you for another sole.
textByHash.fd89b432f0d4ec8a830df60366e640c26baa7d0e: I have accepted it as a gift as they clearly respect my terrible powers. They seek to keep me at bay by giving me valuables.
